title: Shapeville Geometry Education (GitHub)
content: Java/Swing geometry learning application with staged modules, scoring feedback, and progress tracking.

title: MiniMind Full-Pipeline Reproduction (GitHub)
content: Completed full MiniMind workflow on local environment: pretraining, SFT, LoRA, evaluation, and checkpoint resume.
content_zh: 在本地环境完成 MiniMind 全流程：预训练、SFT、LoRA、评估与断点续训。

title: WeClone End-to-End Deployment (GitHub)
content: Completed local setup, data preparation, service startup, and chatbot integration validation for end-to-end WeClone deployment.
content_zh: 完成 WeClone 本地搭建、数据准备、服务启动与聊天平台联调验证，跑通端到端部署。

title: BCI-SSVEP (GitHub)
content: EEG-oriented brain-computer interaction prototype with signal processing and interaction pipeline.
content_zh: 面向 EEG 的脑机交互原型项目，包含信号处理与交互链路实现。

title: WhisperMail (GitHub)
content: Speech-to-email AI productivity workflow integrating recognition and task execution.
content_zh: 语音到邮件的 AI 效率工作流项目，整合识别与任务执行。

title: BECA Dataset Paper (DOI)
content: Scientific Data publication on long-term cattle recognition dataset and baseline workflow.
content_zh: 发表于 Scientific Data 的长期牛只识别数据集与基线流程论文。

title: CRODNet Paper (DOI)
content: Computers and Electronics in Agriculture publication on top-view rotated cattle detection and lightweight modeling.
content_zh: 发表于 Computers and Electronics in Agriculture 的顶视角牛体旋转检测与轻量化建模论文。

title: Narrative Complexity Analysis (Under Review)
content: Under-review work on semantic entropy and character diversity modeling for computational literary studies.
content_zh: 在审研究：基于语义熵与角色多样性建模的计算文学叙事复杂度分析。
